description_long: This is a rectangular, soft package of UltraFresh Ultra Thin Training Pants, designed for babies and toddlers. The packaging is predominantly white with bold green and blue branding, and features a large image of the training pants on the front. The front highlights key product features such as lightweight, flexibility, and super absorbency, and specifies the size as XL for babies weighing 26 to 37 lbs, with 32 pieces inside. The sides of the package display usage instructions with pictograms, recycling information, and a size chart for different weight categories. The back and side panels also include manufacturer details, contact information, and additional branding. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and clearly targeted at parents seeking high-quality personal care products for children.
description: A rectangular, soft white package of UltraFresh Ultra Thin Training Pants, featuring bold branding, product imagery, and detailed usage instructions. The pack is designed for babies, with XL sizing and 32 pieces inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the UltraFresh branding, product image, XL size, and key features in colorful text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying pictogram instructions, recycling symbols, and a partial view of the branding.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the main branding and product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a size chart, manufacturer information, and contact details, plus a partial product image.
attribute_brand_logo: The UltraFresh logo is prominently displayed on the front and top of the package in large green and blue letters, with a small red heart and 'Parent's best choice' in the top left corner.
attribute_fastening_type: Pull-on style; no visible adhesive or hook-and-loop fasteners, indicating an elastic waistband for easy wear.
attribute_absorbent_core_pattern: Implied quilted or channeled pattern, as suggested by the product image and typical design for training pants.
attribute_elastic_waistband_design: Elastic waistband is visible in the product image, appearing wide and ribbed for comfort and secure fit, positioned at the top of the pants.
